name: Vinny Ki Kitaab
overview: Vinny appears to be an ordinary housewife living a quiet, routine life — but behind closed doors, her mind is a world of erotic fantasies and secret desires. Through these vivid, intimate stories she escapes the monotony of everyday life with her husband. Only one person knows the truth about her hidden world: her best friend, Sarla. But when her private stories are stolen and published, she is shocked to discover that betrayal comes from those she trusted most. Forced out of the shadows, Vinny sets out to reclaim her voice, her truth, and her life.

trailers.title: Vinny Ki Kitaab (Official Trailer) | Aalisha P, Abhishek K, Ssanjay G, Mansi Jain, Afreen Alvi
